questions.question: Define the time complexity of the operation for searching an element in a singly linked list. Explain your answer with an example.
Compare and contrast singly linked lists and arrays in terms of memory usage and insertion/deletion operations. Provide a diagram illustrating your explanation.
questions.hint: Use a simple programming language like Python or Java to illustrate your diagram

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'next' pointer in a node of a singly linked list? Provide an example of how this pointer is used in a linked list implementation.
questions.hint: Focus on the basic structure of a singly linked list
